post.description:
Upload a single image file to the specified folder type.

**Allowed folder types:**
- `products` - Product images (default)
- `reviews` - Review images uploaded by customers
- `banners` - Homepage and promotional banners
- `ads` - Advertisement images
- `categories` - Category images
- `brands` - Brand logos
- `avatars` - User profile pictures

**Supported formats:** JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG

**Max file size:** 5MB

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Folder type to upload the image to. Defaults to "products"

400.description: Invalid file type or size exceeded

post.description:
Upload multiple image files to the specified folder type (max 10 files).

**Allowed folder types:**
- `products` - Product images (default)
- `reviews` - Review images uploaded by customers
- `banners` - Homepage and promotional banners
- `ads` - Advertisement images
- `categories` - Category images
- `brands` - Brand logos
- `avatars` - User profile pictures

**Supported formats:** JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG

**Max file size:** 5MB per file

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Folder type to upload the images to. Defaults to "products"

400.description: Invalid file type, size exceeded, or too many files

delete.description: Delete an uploaded file by filename. Requires admin role.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Folder type where the file is located. Defaults to "products"

post.description:
Upload a single image or video file for vendor stories.

**Supported image formats:** JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG

**Supported video formats:** MP4, MOV, AVI, WebM

**Max file size:** 
- Images: 5MB
- Videos: 50MB

file.description: Image or video file to upload

400.description: Invalid file type or size exceeded

get.description:
Returns personalized product recommendations based on various strategies.
      
      **Recommendation Types:**
      - `for_you` - Personalized mix of trending, top-rated, and featured products (uses view history if userId provided)
      - `similar` - Products similar to a specific product (requires `productId`)
      - `trending` - Products with most recent review activity
      - `top_rated` - Highest-rated products based on reviews
      - `new_arrivals` - Most recently added products
      - `best_sellers` - Products with most reviews overall
      - `on_sale` - Products currently on sale
      - `recently_viewed` - User's recently viewed products (requires `userId`)

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Product ID for similar products (required when type=similar)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of products to return (1-50, default: 10)

get.description: Returns a personalized mix of recommended products. If userId is provided, recommendations are based on view history.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID for personalized recommendations based on view history

parameters.description: Number of products to return (1-50, default: 10)
